name: context
description: Read + sensitivity surface for the ContextGenerator pipeline. Owns /v1/context/items, /v1/context/file, /v1/context/items/:id/sensitivity, /v1/context/sensitivity/{confirm,whitelist}. Backs the QuickContextPicker (input popover) and the ContextHub (header modal). The pipeline workers (auto-title, categorizer, sorter, LINK) live in modules/context-generator; the global+cwd context helpers live in bridge/context/{global,cwd}.ts. Disabling the module 404s the picker fetches and locks the Hub modal in 'no items' state.
